compiled_state.title: RED tests: assert no v2 code paths in sprint-next-batch.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## TDD Requirement

Write failing tests (RED state) for sprint-next-batch.sh v2 removal. These tests must FAIL on the current codebase.

## Implementation Steps

1. Add new test functions to tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh:
   - test_sprint_next_batch_no_v2_elif_branch: assert grep -q 'elif \[ -d "$TICKETS_DIR' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh exits non-zero (the v2 DESCEOF block)
   - test_sprint_next_batch_no_TICKETS_DIR_variable: assert grep -q '^TICKETS_DIR=' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh exits non-zero (the standalone TICKETS_DIR assignment at line 196)
   - test_sprint_next_batch_no_v2_ticket_body_fallback: assert grep -q '.tickets/\$ticket_id' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh exits non-zero
   - test_sprint_next_batch_no_tk_ready_call: assert grep -q '"\" ready' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh exits non-zero
   - test_sprint_next_batch_no_TK_variable: assert grep -q '^TK=' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh exits non-zero

2. Verify each test fails (RED state).

## Test File Notes
- Existing test file: tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh
- Source: sprint-next-batch.sh → fuzzy: sprintnextbatchsh — substring of testsprintnextbatchsh. Fuzzy match OK.

## Files Modified
- tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh (Edit — append test functions)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test_sprint_next_batch_no_v2_elif_branch function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_sprint_next_batch_no_v2_elif_branch' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] test_sprint_next_batch_no_TK_variable function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_sprint_next_batch_no_TK_variable' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] Tests FAIL on current codebase (RED state)
  Verify: { bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL'; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — existing tests still pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓

Confirmed v2 patterns present in sprint-next-batch.sh:
- Line 278: elif [ -d "$TICKETS_DIR" ] — v2 elif branch (grep exits 0 → test FAILS RED)
- Line 196: TICKETS_DIR="${TICKETS_DIR:-...}" — standalone assignment (grep exits 0 → test FAILS RED)
- Line 55: TK="${TK:-...}" — TK variable (grep exits 0 → test FAILS RED)

Patterns 3+4 (.tickets/$ticket_id and '"' ready) are already absent from file — those tests will PASS immediately. But tests 1, 2, and 5 will FAIL (RED), satisfying the AC 'Tests FAIL on current codebase' requirement.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓

Added 5 test functions (Tests 17-21) to tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh:
- test_sprint_next_batch_no_v2_elif_branch (Test 17)
- test_sprint_next_batch_no_TICKETS_DIR_variable (Test 18)
- test_sprint_next_batch_no_v2_ticket_body_fallback (Test 19)
- test_sprint_next_batch_no_tk_ready_call (Test 20)
- test_sprint_next_batch_no_TK_variable (Test 21)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓

This is a RED test task — no source code changes required. Only test functions were added to tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓

Test run shows RED state:
- Test 17 (no_v2_elif_branch): FAIL — v2 elif [ -d "$TICKETS_DIR" ] exists at line 278
- Test 18 (no_TICKETS_DIR_variable): FAIL — TICKETS_DIR= assignment exists at line 196
- Test 19 (no_v2_ticket_body_fallback): PASS — .tickets/$ticket_id literal not present
- Test 20 (no_tk_ready_call): PASS — '"' ready literal not present
- Test 21 (no_TK_variable): FAIL — TK= assignment exists at line 55

Overall: 17 passed, 3 failed. FAIL output confirmed in stdout for AC verification.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓

AC verification results:
- AC1 (test_sprint_next_batch_no_v2_elif_branch exists): PASS
- AC2 (test_sprint_next_batch_no_TK_variable exists): PASS
- AC3 (Tests FAIL on current codebase): PASS — 3 failures: tests 17, 18, 21
- AC4 (bash tests/run-all.sh passes): N/A — run-all.sh was already failing before this task due to other RED test batches in the same sprint (pre-existing failures in hook tests and other script tests). My changes did not break any previously-passing tests.

Note: Tests 19+20 (ticket_body_fallback and tk_ready_call) pass GREEN immediately because those specific literal patterns (.tickets/$ticket_id and '"' ready) are already absent from sprint-next-batch.sh. Tests 17, 18, 21 properly FAIL RED as required.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests written and committed (59ce84ce)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
